{{Quote|I can’t bring up those records. I’m only the night clerk. I don’t have the password to check the day records.|Keesa|<ref name="TG" />}}
'''Keesa''' was the [[Pa'lowick/Legends|Pa'lowick]] assistant of [[Dama Whitesun Brunk]] at the [[Sidi Driss Inn]], a [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], when [[Thrawn's confederation|Imperial]] remnant troops [[Mission to Tatooine (Killik Twilight)|raided]] the town in search of the famous moss-painting, ''[[Killik Twilight]]'', who assaulted Keesa. For their actions against her, the troops were reprimanded by their [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]]—an undercover [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]—and Keesa received an apology from the Grand Admiral for his treatment of her.<ref name="TG" />
